title: Has anyone used iYurek? Is it legit?
author: momithrewup
selftext: Came across a platform called iYurek – it’s an ai tool for simplifying market data and show real-time correlations. Also has a ton of pre-built strategies or backtesting. Has anyone here actually used it? I’m curious if it’s worth looking into and paying for, or if there’s something better out there. Would love to hear any feedback or alt recommendations

comments.author: damodalio
comments.body: Haven’t used it and am wondering the same thing
